name: add_domain
description: Add a custom domain to a Vercel project. After adding, you must configure DNS records to point to Vercel's servers. Vercel will automatically provision an SSL certificate once DNS is verified.

parameters.name: idOrName
parameters.description: The project ID or name to add the domain to.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The domain name to add (e.g., 'myapp.com' or 'www.myapp.com').

parameters.name: redirect
parameters.description: Domain to redirect to. If set, requests to this domain will redirect to the specified domain.

parameters.name: redirectStatusCode
parameters.description: HTTP status code for the redirect: 301 (permanent) or 307 (temporary). Only applicable when 'redirect' is set.
